At the customer's direction the firm discontinued its efforts to complete process validation for a product, yet it continued manufacturing batches of that product for commercial distribution.

The firm labeled much wider storage conditions (in degrees Fahrenheit) than its stability data supported, at the instruction of its customer (and even after narrowing the range it remained outside the supporting data); the firm conceded it "can no longer rely on written justifications from product owners to deviate from the general [C]GMP requirements."
